WeaponSkills.Name: Club Usage
WeaponSkills.Description: Improves effectiveness when wielding clubs or maces.

DefensiveSkills.Name: Shielding
DefensiveSkills.Description: Increases block chance and armor absorption when a shield is equipped.

DefensiveSkills.Name: Dodge
DefensiveSkills.Description: Increases dodge chance to entirely avoid physical strikes.

DefensiveSkills.Name: Parry
DefensiveSkills.Description: Increases parry chance to deflect melee damage with weapons.

MagicSchools.Name: Fire Magic
MagicSchools.Description: Increases fire-based spell power and reduces fire mana costs.

MagicSchools.Name: Ice Magic
MagicSchools.Description: Increases ice-based spell power and adds slowing potency.

MagicSchools.Name: Holy Magic
MagicSchools.Description: Increases holy-based magic potency and divine healing outputs.

MagicSchools.Name: Shadow Magic
MagicSchools.Description: Increases shadow-based magical strikes and critical power.

MagicSchools.Name: Healing
MagicSchools.Description: Improves pure healing throughput and mana-saving chances.

SkillGrowthModel.UsageTrigger: Repeated hit or trigger of associated category
